title: En Anbae (Tum Hi Ho) Lyrics Aashiqui 2
stanzas: <div>En Anbae (Tum Hi Ho) Lyrics in Tamil Aashiqui 2

En anbae endhan aaruyire
nee illaadha vazhvum
verumaiyadi.(2)

un kaarkuzhalum
andha mazhai thuliyum
ennai thazhuvidum
podhundhan niyabagamae

oru ganam nera pirivaiyum
ingae oru yugamaagave
kalikkindren
en kangalil valiyum
neer thuliyil
or thuli thuliyaai
unnai kaangindren

nee illai endraal
naanum illai ingae
ne swaasamum neethaane

un paadalil enai marandhen
anbae undhan
vazhi nadanthen

veenaiyin naadham
pol naanum unakku
sanathi illaatha sangeetham
edharkku

ini unadhu vizhi
adhu enadhu vazhi
naam iruvarum
oruvarandro

nee andro
ini nee andro
en vazhkaiyum
ini nee andro.

nee andro
ini nee andro
en swaasamum
ini nee andro.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song En Anbae?

The song En Anbae expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional connection between lovers.

What is the plot context of Aashiqui 2 related to this song?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in Aashiqui 2, highlighting the struggles and emotional depth of the lead characters' relationship.

Who is the singer of En Anbae?

The song is sung by Anirban Chakraborty, whose voice adds a unique charm to the melody.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for En Anbae was composed by Mithoon, known for his soulful and romantic compositions.

When was En Anbae released?

The song was released on October 4, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Anbae, the protagonist expresses profound love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romance in Aashiqui 2. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. It beautifully conveys the emotional turmoil faced by lovers, highlighting both joy and sorrow. This poignant track resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of En Anbae from Aashiqui 2, where Anirban Chakraborty's soulful voice beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. This mesmerizing melody, composed by Mithoon, resonates with deep emotions that will tug at your heartstrings. Dive into this romantic ballad that perfectly encapsulates the bittersweet moments of love.
stanzaMeanings: My dear, without you, life is just emptiness.
Your hair and that raindrop will embrace me, that memory is still alive.
When you close your eyes, you come to me. When you open your eyes, you seem to disappear.
With separation, we recognize each other, and later we feel the pain.
A song directly brings separation, here I play like a new era, in my eyes, I see you like drops of water.
If you are not here, then I am not here either, your breath is only you.
When you close your eyes, you come to me. When you open your eyes, you seem to disappear.
With separation, we recognize each other, and later we feel the pain.
In your song, I forget myself, dear, I walk your path.
Like the sound of a veena, I have no music without you.
Now your eyes are my path, we both are one and the same.
When you close your eyes, you come to me. When you open your eyes, you seem to disappear.
With separation, we recognize each other, and later we feel the pain.
You are my life now, you are my life now.
You are my breath now, you are my breath now.
